title: Free, White and 21
writer: Larry Buchanan, Harold Hoffman, Cliff Pope
actors: Frederick O'Neal, Annalena Lund, George Edgley
plot: The central conflict in this film is whether African-American businessman Ernie Jones (played by O'Neal) raped Swedish immigrant and civil rights Freedom Rider Greta Mae Hansen (played by Lund). Jones was the proprietor of the hot...
